title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Hiranandani Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Hiranandani Group
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
